UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores additional profile information for users authenticated via an external system. This entity complements, but does not replace, the core authentication system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, typically linked to an external authentication system's user ID.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Flight.title: Flight
Flight.description: Represents a discoverable flight service available for booking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Flight entity.

airline.description: The name of the airline operating the flight.

flightNumber.description: The unique flight number assigned by the airline.

departureAirportCode.description: IATA code of the departure airport (e.g., 'JFK').

arrivalAirportCode.description: IATA code of the arrival airport (e.g., 'LAX').

departureDateTime.description: The scheduled date and time of departure for the flight.

arrivalDateTime.description: The scheduled date and time of arrival for the flight.

durationMinutes.description: The total estimated duration of the flight in minutes.

basePrice.description: The base price of one ticket for this flight, before taxes or additional fees.

currency.description: The currency code for the flight price (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

availableSeats.description: The number of seats currently available for booking on this flight.

description.description: A brief description of the flight or additional service details.

Hotel.title: Hotel
Hotel.description: Represents a discoverable hotel service available for booking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Hotel entity.

address.description: The full street address of the hotel.

city.description: The city where the hotel is located.

country.description: The country where the hotel is located.

starRating.description: The star rating of the hotel (e.g., 1 to 5 stars).

description.description: A detailed description of the hotel, its features, and services.

pricePerNight.description: The average price per night for a standard room at the hotel.

currency.description: The currency code for the hotel price (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

imageUrl.description: URL to a primary image of the hotel.

amenities.description: A list of amenities offered by the hotel (e.g., 'WiFi', 'Pool', 'Restaurant').

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Represents a discoverable activity or tour service available for booking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Activity entity.

name.description: The name of the activity or tour.

location.description: The location where the activity takes place (e.g., city, specific landmark, meeting point).

description.description: A detailed description of the activity, what it entails, and what to expect.

durationHours.description: The estimated duration of the activity in hours.

basePrice.description: The base price per person for the activity.

currency.description: The currency code for the activity price (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

imageUrl.description: URL to a primary image of the activity.

availableDates.description: A list of specific dates when the activity is available for booking.

BookingBasket.title: BookingBasket
BookingBasket.description: Represents a temporary collection of selected travel services that a user intends to book before checkout.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BookingBasket entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this booking basket. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N BookingBasket)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the booking basket was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the booking basket was last updated.

BookingBasketItem.title: BookingBasketItem
BookingBasketItem.description: Represents a single travel service selected and added to a user's booking basket.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BookingBasketItem entity.

bookingBasketId.description: Reference to the BookingBasket this item belongs to. (Relationship: BookingBasket 1:N BookingBasketItem)

serviceType.description: The type of travel service being added (e.g., 'flight', 'hotel', 'activity'). This helps identify which service entity 'serviceId' refers to.

serviceId.description: Reference to the specific service entity (Flight, Hotel, or Activity) that this item represents.

quantity.description: The number of units for this service (e.g., number of flight tickets, number of hotel rooms, number of activity participants).

startDate.description: The start date and time for the selected service (e.g., flight departure, hotel check-in, activity start time).

endDate.description: The end date and time for the selected service (e.g., flight arrival, hotel check-out, activity end time).

priceAtAddToCart.description: The total price of this item (unit price * quantity) at the time it was added to the basket, reflecting real-time availability price.

currency.description: The currency code for the price of this item.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a confirmed booking made by a user after successful payment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Booking entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who made the booking. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Booking)

bookingReference.description: A unique, user-facing alphanumeric reference code for the booking, generated upon confirmation.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount paid for the entire booking.

currency.description: The currency code for the total booking amount (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

bookingDateTime.description: Timestamp when the booking was successfully confirmed and payment processed.

status.description: The overall status of the booking (e.g., 'confirmed', 'pending', 'cancelled', 'completed').

paymentStatus.description: The status of the payment for this booking (e.g., 'paid', 'failed', 'refunded', 'pending').

paymentTransactionId.description: Reference ID from the payment gateway (e.g., Paystack) for the successful transaction.

BookingItem.title: BookingItem
BookingItem.description: Represents a single travel service included as part of a confirmed booking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BookingItem entity.

bookingId.description: Reference to the Booking this item belongs to. (Relationship: Booking 1:N BookingItem)

serviceType.description: The type of travel service booked (e.g., 'flight', 'hotel', 'activity'). This helps identify which service entity 'serviceId' refers to.

serviceId.description: Reference to the specific service entity (Flight, Hotel, or Activity) that was booked.

quantity.description: The number of units for this service (e.g., number of flight tickets, number of hotel rooms, number of activity participants).

startDate.description: The start date and time for the booked service (e.g., flight departure, hotel check-in, activity start time).

endDate.description: The end date and time for the booked service (e.g., flight arrival, hotel check-out, activity end time).

unitPriceAtBooking.description: The price per unit of the service at the time of booking, reflecting the price confirmed at checkout.

totalItemPrice.description: The total price for this specific item (unit price * quantity) within the booking.

currency.description: The currency code for the price of this booked item.

definition.description: Stores a user's profile information. Owned by the user specified in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the authenticated user, matching request.auth.uid.

definition.description: Globally discoverable flight services. Publicly readable by all authenticated users. Write access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: flightId
params.description: The unique ID of the flight.

definition.description: Globally discoverable hotel services. Publicly readable by all authenticated users. Write access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: hotelId
params.description: The unique ID of the hotel.

definition.description: Globally discoverable activity services. Publicly readable by all authenticated users. Write access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: activityId
params.description: The unique ID of the activity.

definition.description: Stores a user's temporary booking basket. Owned by the user specified in the path. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the authenticated user, matching request.auth.uid.

params.name: basketId
params.description: The unique ID of the booking basket.

definition.description: Stores individual items within a user's booking basket. Inherits ownership from the parent booking basket. Requires denormalized 'userProfileId' (matching path userId) for authorization independence to avoid 'get()' calls.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the authenticated user, matching request.auth.uid.

params.name: basketId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent booking basket.

params.name: itemId
params.description: The unique ID of the booking basket item.

definition.description: Stores a confirmed booking made by a user. Owned by the user specified in the path. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the authenticated user, matching request.auth.uid.

params.name: bookingId
params.description: The unique ID of the confirmed booking.

definition.description: Stores individual services within a confirmed booking. Inherits ownership from the parent booking. Requires denormalized 'userProfileId' (matching path userId) for authorization independence to avoid 'get()' calls.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the authenticated user, matching request.auth.uid.

params.name: bookingId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent confirmed booking.

params.name: bookedItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the booked item.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure for VoyageFlow is designed with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and consistent Access Modeling to ensure robust security rules and simplified debugging. 

**Authorization Independence via Denormalization:**
This design criticaly avoids hierarchical authorization dependencies by denormalizing ownership. For all user-specific nested collections (e.g., `BookingBasketItem`, `BookingItem`), the `userProfileId` (which directly corresponds to `request.auth.uid`) is explicitly included within each document. This means that a security rule evaluating access to a `BookingBasketItem` can directly check `request.auth.uid == resource.data.userProfileId` without needing to perform a `get()` operation on the parent `BookingBasket` document. This not only makes rules atomic and easier to reason about but also removes potential performance bottlenecks and complexity in rule evaluation.

**Structural Segregation for QAPs (Queryable Authorization Patterns):**

1.  **User-Owned Data:** Entities like `UserProfile`, `BookingBasket`, and `Booking` are structured under `/users/{userId}/...` paths. This path-based ownership (`/users/{userId}/profile`, `/users/{userId}/bookingBaskets/{basketId}`, `/users/{userId}/bookings/{bookingId}`) ensures that a user can only query or modify their own data. The security rules for these collections will simply verify that `request.auth.uid == userId` (where `userId` is the wildcard in the path). This pattern inherently supports efficient `list` operations (QAPs) because a user's query for their baskets or bookings will always be scoped to their `userId` in the path, preventing unauthorized data exposure.

2.  **Globally Discoverable Services:** `Flight`, `Hotel`, and `Activity` entities are placed in top-level collections (`/flights`, `/hotels`, `/activities`). These collections maintain a homogeneous security posture: they are globally readable by all authenticated users. Write access to these collections would typically be restricted to administrators, managed through a separate 'roles' collection (e.g., `/roles_admin/{uid}`) where the existence of a document signifies admin status. This segregation means that 'list' queries on these collections are naturally unrestricted for reads, enabling users to discover all available services without complex filtering in rules.

3.  **Nested User-Owned Data:** `BookingBasketItem` and `BookingItem` are nested under their respective parent user-owned entities (e.g., `/users/{userId}/bookingBaskets/{basketId}/items/{itemId}`). As explained above, the denormalized `userProfileId` within each item document ensures direct authorization checks, maintaining the QAP principle by allowing `list` operations within a specific basket or booking without requiring expensive parent lookups.

**Access Modeling & Data Clarity:**
-   **Path-Based Ownership:** Consistently applied for all user-specific data, clearly delineating ownership. E.g., `/users/{userId}/profile`.
-   **Denormalization:** `userProfileId` is denormalized into `BookingBasket` and `Booking` documents, matching the `userId` wildcard for direct ownership verification. Critically, this `userProfileId` is also denormalized into `BookingBasketItem` and `BookingItem` to achieve Authorization Independence. (This means the `BookingBasketItem` and `BookingItem` schemas implicitly require a `userProfileId` field, even if not explicitly in the provided schema).
-   **Explicit State Modeling:** Entities like `Booking` already use a `status` field, which is a good practice for clarity. `createdAt` and `updatedAt` timestamps are included for auditability and managing data invariants.
